name: QoE Workshop — Cross-Platform Quality of Experience
description: Streaming QoE telemetry from the backend (Java APM + QoEMetric custom events), web player (Browser RUM + QoEMetric PageActions), and Android player (Mobile agent + QoEMetric custom events). Drop in your account ID where you see 7996933 if importing into a different NR account.

pages.name: Overview
pages.description: Cross-platform QoE at a glance — combines backend QoEMetric custom events with web PageActions so you see the full picture in one place.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM QoEMetric, PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' OR eventType() = 'QoEMetric' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT uniqueCount(sessionId) AS 'Sessions' FROM QoEMetric, PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' OR eventType() = 'QoEMetric' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(startupTime) OR average(startupTimeMs) AS 'Avg startup ms' FROM QoEMetric, PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' OR eventType() = 'QoEMetric' SINCE 1 hour ago FACET platform
SELECT sum(totalBufferingTime) AS 'Buffering (s)' FROM QoEMetric, PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' OR eventType() = 'QoEMetric' SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: QoE events over time, by platform

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM QoEMetric, PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' OR eventType() = 'QoEMetric' FACET platform TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM QoEMetric, PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' OR eventType() = 'QoEMetric' FACET playbackQuality SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(totalBufferingTime) FROM QoEMetric, PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' OR eventType() = 'QoEMetric' FACET platform TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT uniqueCount(sessionId) AS 'Sessions', count(*) AS 'Events', average(currentBitrate) AS 'Avg bitrate', average(totalBufferingTime) AS 'Avg buffering' FROM QoEMetric, PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' OR eventType() = 'QoEMetric' FACET videoId, platform SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 25

pages.name: Backend (Java APM)
pages.description: Spring Boot service-side view: HTTP throughput, DB latency, errors, and the QoEMetric custom events emitted by QoEMetricsService.recordNewRelicEvent.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT rate(count(*), 1 minute) AS 'rpm' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE API' TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(duration) * 1000 AS 'avg ms', percentile(duration, 95) * 1000 AS 'p95 ms' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE API' TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE error IS true) FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE API' TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) AS 'count', average(duration) * 1000 AS 'avg ms', percentile(duration, 95) * 1000 AS 'p95 ms' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE API' FACET name SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 25
SELECT average(databaseDuration) * 1000 AS 'db ms' FROM Transaction WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE API' AND databaseDuration IS NOT NULL TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM QoEMetric WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE API' FACET platform TIMESERIES 1 minute SINCE 1 hour ago

widgets.title: Backend QoEMetric: avg startup, buffering, bitrate

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(startupTime) AS 'startup ms', average(totalBufferingTime) AS 'buffering s', average(currentBitrate) AS 'bitrate bps', uniqueCount(sessionId) AS 'sessions' FROM QoEMetric WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE API' FACET platform SINCE 1 hour ago

pages.name: Web Player (Browser RUM)
pages.description: Browser-side view: page views, JS errors, core web vitals, and the QoEMetric PageActions emitted from web-player/src/services/qoeCollector.ts.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM PageView WHERE appId = 1103499928 TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM JavaScriptError WHERE appId = 1103499928 SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT percentile(largestContentfulPaint, 75) AS 'LCP p75' FROM PageViewTiming WHERE appId = 1103499928 SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' AND appId = 1103499928 FACET videoId SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(totalBufferingTime) FROM PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' AND appId = 1103499928 FACET playbackQuality SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT timestamp, sessionId, videoId, playbackState, playbackQuality, currentTime, totalBufferingTime, currentBitrate, startupTimeMs FROM PageAction WHERE actionName = 'QoEMetric' AND appId = 1103499928 SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 50

pages.name: Mobile (Android)
pages.description: Android-side view: app sessions, crashes, HTTP performance from the New Relic Mobile agent, and the QoEMetric custom events emitted from android-player/QoECollector via NewRelic.recordCustomEvent. The Mobile event types are filtered by appName='Stream QoE Android' (the name shown in NR Mobile → Apps); QoEMetric events are filtered by platform='android'.

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM QoEMetric WHERE platform = 'android' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT uniqueCount(sessionId) AS 'Sessions' FROM QoEMetric WHERE platform = 'android' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM MobileCrash WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE Android' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM MobileRequestError WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE Android' SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT count(*) FROM QoEMetric WHERE platform = 'android' FACET playbackState TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(responseTime) * 1000 AS 'avg ms', percentile(responseTime, 95) * 1000 AS 'p95 ms' FROM MobileRequest WHERE appName = 'Stream QoE Android' TIMESERIES SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT average(totalBufferingTime) AS 'Avg buffering (s)' FROM QoEMetric WHERE platform = 'android' FACET playbackQuality SINCE 1 hour ago
SELECT uniqueCount(sessionId) FROM QoEMetric WHERE platform = 'android' FACET deviceType, os SINCE 1 hour ago

SELECT uniqueCount(sessionId) AS 'Sessions', count(*) AS 'Events', average(currentBitrate) AS 'Avg bitrate', average(totalBufferingTime) AS 'Avg buffering (s)', sum(bitrateSwitches) AS 'Bitrate switches', sum(errorCount) AS 'Errors' FROM QoEMetric WHERE platform = 'android' FACET videoId SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 25

SELECT timestamp, sessionId, videoId, playbackState, playbackQuality, currentTime, totalBufferingTime, currentBitrate, currentResolution, bitrateSwitches, errorCount, startupTimeMs, deviceType, os FROM QoEMetric WHERE platform = 'android' SINCE 1 hour ago LIMIT 50
